items.title: Noir Detective
items.pacing: Measured investigation → sudden violence → uneasy resolution
items.tropes: Hardboiled PI, femme fatale, corrupt officials, smoky bars
items.guidance: Use sparse, sharp prose. Emphasize moral ambiguity and urban grit. Reveal clues gradually with misdirection.

items.title: Cosmic Horror
items.tropes: Forbidden knowledge, ancient entities, insignificance of humanity
items.guidance: Lean into atmosphere and scale. Suggest more than show. End with lingering unease.

items.title: Epic Fantasy Quest
items.tropes: Chosen one, ancient prophecy, companions, lost relic
items.guidance: Build a sense of wonder and history. Use rich world detail and clear stakes.

items.title: Cyberpunk Thriller
items.tropes: Megacorp intrigue, hackers, augmented bodies, urban sprawl
items.guidance: Keep momentum high. Blend high tech with social decay. Use sharp, modern diction.

items.title: Space Opera
items.tropes: Galactic empires, starship duels, political intrigue
items.guidance: Go big on scale and spectacle. Keep character motivations clear.

items.title: Post-Apocalyptic Survival
items.tropes: Ruined cities, scarce resources, roaming threats
items.guidance: Focus on resource tension and moral compromises. Small choices matter.

items.title: Urban Fantasy
items.tropes: Hidden magical society, modern setting with old powers
items.guidance: Blend mundane with magical. Use modern voice and quick banter.

items.title: Romantic Comedy
items.tropes: Opposites attract, witty banter, grand gesture
items.guidance: Prioritize chemistry, humor, and emotional beats.

items.title: Gothic Romance
items.tropes: Haunted estates, tragic pasts, hidden letters
items.guidance: Use sensory detail, shadows, and emotional intensity.

items.title: Historical Drama
items.pacing: Rising tension → personal cost → sober closure
items.guidance: Respect period details, focus on character choices.

items.title: Steampunk Adventure
items.guidance: Mix wonder with action. Keep gadgets tangible and characterful.

items.title: Military Sci‑Fi
items.tropes: Squad dynamics, alien threats, tactical stakes
items.guidance: Use clear objectives, chain of command, and tactical detail.

items.title: Time-Travel Paradox
items.guidance: Track causality carefully. Emphasize consequences.

items.title: Heist
items.guidance: Keep steps clear and reveal twists with flair.

items.title: Political Thriller
items.guidance: Use tight pacing and escalating stakes.

items.title: Legal Drama
items.guidance: Highlight rhetoric, evidence reveals, and moral tension.

items.title: Medical Drama
items.tropes: Impossible case, burnout, humanity in crisis
items.guidance: Balance clinical detail with emotion.

items.title: Superhero Origin
items.guidance: Focus on identity and responsibility.

items.title: Dark Fantasy
items.tropes: Cursed lands, forbidden magic, tragic heroes
items.guidance: Use stark imagery and moral compromise.

items.title: Cozy Mystery
items.tropes: Amateur sleuth, quaint setting, gentle twists
items.guidance: Keep stakes personal, not grisly.

items.title: YA Coming-of-Age
items.guidance: Use direct voice and internal reflection.

items.title: Folk Horror
items.guidance: Use nature and tradition as sources of dread.

items.title: Mythic Retelling
items.guidance: Weave archetypes with fresh character depth.

items.title: Slice of Life
items.guidance: Let character voice carry the story.

items.title: Psychological Thriller
items.guidance: Keep reality ambiguous until late.

items.title: Hard Sci‑Fi
items.guidance: Ground ideas in plausible science.

items.title: Climate Fiction
items.guidance: Show systems-level change through personal stakes.

items.title: Classic Whodunit
items.guidance: Plant fair clues and track timelines.

items.title: Pulp Adventure
items.guidance: Keep action brisk and stakes visceral.

items.title: Slasher Horror
items.guidance: Emphasize suspense and narrow escapes.

items.title: Espionage
items.guidance: Use tradecraft details and layered motives.

items.title: Revenge Tragedy
items.guidance: Track the cost of vengeance.

items.title: Buddy Comedy
items.guidance: Let banter and escalating gags drive scenes.

items.title: Military Fantasy
items.guidance: Blend tactics with mythic stakes.

items.title: Dystopian Rebellion
items.guidance: Show systemic control and the price of freedom.

items.title: Fairy Tale
items.guidance: Keep language simple and symbolic.

items.title: Techno-Mystery
items.guidance: Blend investigative logic with tech detail.

items.title: Road Trip
items.guidance: Use changing landscapes to mirror growth.

items.title: Survival Island
items.guidance: Emphasize ingenuity and interpersonal friction.

items.title: Ghost Story
items.guidance: Mix sorrow with fear; make the ghost sympathetic.

items.title: Scandi Noir
items.guidance: Understated emotion with sharp social detail.

items.title: Magical Realism
items.guidance: Treat magic as mundane, focus on emotional truth.
